promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected because the stronger direct TERM_CONFLICT parent for Constraints.md still lacked its own A2-mid child reduction after the paired Constraints. Entropy child was completed.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the exact source-specific seams: worldview closure, equality-replacement inflation, allowable-math funnel drift, manifold or Hopf pressure, must-emerge axis and engine rhetoric, governance residue, and the late restart packet.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: Existing A2-mid and contract-side packets were used to keep the reduction distinct from the paired entropy-chain sibling while grounding axis, scalar, geometry, and engine boundaries in stronger current fences.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred as the next warm engine-pattern contradiction seam once the paired Constraints siblings both had direct child reductions.
Not selected because the stronger term-conflict parent already isolates the needed contradiction structure with enough precision for bounded reduction.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent term-conflict batch plus the comparison anchors were sufficient to isolate the reusable governance packets, the foundation-lock overclaims, and the late restart boundary without reopening the raw stitched note.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the cleanest governance, anti-drift, classifier, and precursor-bridge residue from the stronger direct Constraints parent.
They remain source-linked, proposal-side, and explicitly bounded by the later modular contract stack.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain worldview packets, identity-law overclaims, inevitability rhetoric, or stitched closure moves rather than clean reusable A2-2 packets.
This batch exists to keep those overclaims visible while preventing them from backflowing into active A2.
notes: Operated from repo-held intake artifacts only after rereading the A2-mid prerequisite surfaces.
Used the paired Constraints. Entropy child only as comparison context so the two sibling reductions stay distinct.
No raw-source reread was needed because the stronger term-conflict parent already isolates the necessary contradiction structure.
